outlook.summary: The market exhibits a highly stable positive GEX environment across all expirations. Spot is located just below the massive 680 Call Resonance, suggesting strong overhead resistance. The alignment of the 0DTE Gamma Flip and Max Pain at 671 creates a magnetic structural floor. Expect tight range-bound behavior between the 671 pivot and 680 resistance.

levels.motivazione: Massive Call OI across all expirations (18.8k 0DTE, 8.3k Weekly, 24.2k Monthly) creates an impenetrable upper boundary.

0DTE Gamma Flip (671.32) aligns perfectly with 0DTE Max Pain (671.0). Establishes the definitive intraday dealer equilibrium.
Extreme Put OI in 0DTE (16.4k) and Monthly (21.3k) defines the ultimate structural floor and maximum pain boundary.
Heavy Put OI concentration in Weekly (7.9k) and Monthly (8.5k) provides immediate structural support below the Gamma Flip.
Significant Monthly Call OI (11.5k) limits upward breakout scenarios beyond the immediate 680 resistance.
